properties.name: Audit-defensible research outputs
properties.definition: Produce research outputs that survive regulatory and internal-audit scrutiny, with traceable provenance for every claim.

properties.name: Fast time to first value
properties.definition: Reach a first useful research output with minimal onboarding and configuration overhead.

properties.name: Predictable, defensible tooling cost
properties.definition: Keep tooling spend predictable and easy to justify to procurement within a constrained budget.
